locations.description: High-level project overview with goals, requirements summary, and key assumptions for activejob-temporal gem v0.1.
Concise statement of the project's primary goal: build a production-ready ActiveJob-Temporal integration gem.
Summary of core functionality and quality requirements for v0.1 release.
Platform, operational, and scope assumptions for the project (Ruby >= 4.0, Rails >= 7.2, Temporal SDK GA, etc.).
Overview of the architectural style, technology stack, key components, and data model.
Explanation of the Adapter + Orchestration Pattern used to bridge ActiveJob and Temporal.
Detailed technology stack including Ruby, Rails, Temporal SDK, dependencies, and serialization formats.
List and description of primary and supporting gem components (Adapter, Workflow, Activity, Client, etc.).
Logical data model describing job payloads, workflow metadata, retry policies, and configuration.
Description of API surfaces (ActiveJob adapter, Temporal client, worker execution) and communication patterns.
Communication patterns between components: synchronous, long polling, async activity execution, cancellation.
List of planned diagrams, specifications, and documentation artifacts (PlantUML, JSON Schema, Markdown docs).
Complete directory structure for the gem with justifications for key layout decisions.
Iteration 1 plan: Project setup, gem structure, foundation modules (Configuration, Client, Payload, RetryMapper, SearchAttributes, Logger).
Task I1.T1: Initialize gem structure (gemspec, Gemfile, Rakefile, basic files).
Task I1.T2: Generate architecture diagrams (Component, Container, ERD).
Task I1.T3: Implement Configuration module with DSL and configuration reference docs.
Task I1.T4: Implement Temporal Client wrapper with memoization.
Task I1.T5: Implement Payload Serializer with size limits and JSON Schema.
Task I1.T6: Implement Retry Mapper (retry_on/discard_on to RetryPolicy translation).
Task I1.T7: Implement Search Attributes Builder and update configuration docs.
Task I1.T8: Implement Logger helper for structured JSON logging.
Task I1.T9: Run Rubocop and fix style issues.
Task I1.T10: Run unit tests and verify >= 90% coverage.
Iteration 2 plan: Temporal Workflow and Activity implementation, sequence diagrams.
Task I2.T1: Generate sequence diagrams (Enqueue, Execution, Cancellation flows).
Task I2.T2: Implement AjWorkflow (Temporal workflow with sleep and activity execution).
Task I2.T3: Implement AjRunnerActivity (executes job logic, error mapping).
Task I2.T4: Implement Workflow ID builder helper (deterministic ID generation).
Task I2.T5: Implement Task Queue resolver helper (queue name to task queue).
Task I2.T6: Run Rubocop and fix style issues.
Task I2.T7: Run unit tests and verify >= 90% coverage.
Iteration 3 plan: ActiveJob adapter implementation and cancellation API.
Task I3.T1: Implement TemporalAdapter enqueue method (immediate job execution).
Task I3.T2: Implement TemporalAdapter enqueue_at method (scheduled jobs).
Task I3.T3: Implement enqueue_after_transaction_commit? method.
Task I3.T4: Register TemporalAdapter with ActiveJob (adapter lookup).
Task I3.T5: Implement Cancellation API (cancel(job_class, job_id) method).
Task I3.T6: Update cancellation sequence diagram with actual implementation.
Task I3.T7: Run Rubocop and fix style issues.
Task I3.T8: Run unit tests and verify >= 90% coverage.
Iteration 4 plan: Worker bootstrap script, integration tests with Temporal test server.
Task I4.T1: Implement worker bootstrap script (bin/temporal-worker) with graceful shutdown.
Task I4.T2: Set up Temporal test server helper for integration tests.
Task I4.T3: Write integration test for immediate job execution (end-to-end).
Task I4.T4: Write integration test for scheduled job execution (set(wait:)).
Task I4.T5: Write integration test for retry behavior (retry_on with transient errors).
Task I4.T6: Write integration test for discard behavior (discard_on non-retryable errors).
Task I4.T7: Write integration test for job cancellation with heartbeating.
Task I4.T8: Write integration test for Search Attributes visibility.
Task I4.T9: Run all integration tests and verify >= 90% overall coverage.
Task I4.T10: Run Rubocop on all code (lib, spec, bin).
Iteration 5 plan: Comprehensive documentation, example Rails app, gem release preparation.
Task I5.T1: Write comprehensive README (installation, quickstart, configuration, usage, limitations).
Task I5.T2: Generate YARD API documentation for all public classes and methods.
Task I5.T3: Write migration guide (Sidekiq/Resque to activejob-temporal).
Task I5.T4: Create example Rails app demonstrating all key features.
Task I5.T5: Finalize gemspec with accurate metadata and dependencies.
Task I5.T6: Write CHANGELOG for v0.1.0 release (Keep a Changelog format).
Task I5.T7: Run final quality checks (rubocop, tests, coverage, build, manual tests, docs review).
Task I5.T8: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow (optional but recommended).
Task I5.T9: Tag v0.1.0 release in git and create GitHub release.
Task I5.T10: Publish gem to RubyGems.org (optional for v0.1).
Complete verification and integration strategy including testing levels, CI/CD, quality gates, and release criteria.
Testing strategy: unit tests, integration tests, manual testing, smoke testing.
CI/CD approach using GitHub Actions for linting, testing, coverage, and gem building.
Quality gates: Rubocop, SimpleCov coverage (>= 90%), YARD docs, dependency scanning, payload size validation.
Validation criteria for diagrams, JSON schemas, Markdown docs, and gemspec.
Component integration order across iterations and external system integration (Temporal, Rails).
Go/No-Go release criteria for v0.1.0: functional, quality, documentation, security requirements.
Comprehensive glossary of terms (Activity, Workflow, Temporal, ActiveJob, etc.).
